testcase.name: test_print_integer_no_decimal

failure.message: tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '5' at line 1, column 7

testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:6: in test_print_integer_no_decimal assert run("print(5);") == "5\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:301: in parse tokens = tokenize(source_or_tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:41: in tokenize raise LexError(f"Unexpected character '{value}' at line {line}, column {col}") E tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '5' at line 1, column 7

testcase.name: test_arithmetic_precedence

failure.message: tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 7

testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:10: in test_arithmetic_precedence assert run("print(1 + 2 * 3);") == "7\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:301: in parse tokens = tokenize(source_or_tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:41: in tokenize raise LexError(f"Unexpected character '{value}' at line {line}, column {col}") E tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 7

testcase.name: test_subtraction_and_unary_minus

failure.message: tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 7

testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:15: in test_subtraction_and_unary_minus assert run("print(10 - 3);") == "7\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:301: in parse tokens = tokenize(source_or_tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:41: in tokenize raise LexError(f"Unexpected character '{value}' at line {line}, column {col}") E tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 7

testcase.name: test_float_division

failure.message: tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '3' at line 1, column 7

testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:20: in test_float_division assert run("print(3 / 2);") == "1.5\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:301: in parse tokens = tokenize(source_or_tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:41: in tokenize raise LexError(f"Unexpected character '{value}' at line {line}, column {col}") E tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '3' at line 1, column 7

testcase.name: test_modulo

failure.message: tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '7' at line 1, column 7

testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:24: in test_modulo assert run("print(7 % 3);") == "1\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:301: in parse tokens = tokenize(source_or_tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:41: in tokenize raise LexError(f"Unexpected character '{value}' at line {line}, column {col}") E tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '7' at line 1, column 7

testcase.name: test_string_concat

failure.message: tinylang.parser.ParseError: Expect expression.

testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:33: in test_string_concat assert run('print("hi" + " " + "you");') == "hi you\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:305: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:19: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:42: in statement return self.expr_statement() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:121: in expr_statement expr = self.expression() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:126: in expression return self.assignment() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:129: in assignment expr = self.logic_or() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:142: in logic_or expr = self.logic_and() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:149: in logic_and expr = self.equality() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:156: in equality expr = self.comparison() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:164: in comparison expr = self.term() ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:172: in term expr = self.factor() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:180: in factor expr = self.unary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:192: in unary return self.call() ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:195: in call expr = self.primary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:266: in primary raise ParseError('Expect expression.', self.peek()) E tinylang.parser.ParseError: Expect expression.

testcase.name: test_compare_numbers

failure.message: tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 7

testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:37: in test_compare_numbers assert run("print(1 < 2, 2 < 1);") == "true false\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:301: in parse tokens = tokenize(source_or_tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:41: in tokenize raise LexError(f"Unexpected character '{value}' at line {line}, column {col}") E tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 7

testcase.name: test_compare_equal_unlike_types_is_false

failure.message: tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 7

testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:41: in test_compare_equal_unlike_types_is_false assert run('print(1 == "1");') == "false\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:301: in parse tokens = tokenize(source_or_tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:41: in tokenize raise LexError(f"Unexpected character '{value}' at line {line}, column {col}") E tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 7

testcase.name: test_logical_short_circuit_returns_operand

failure.message: tinylang.parser.ParseError: Expect expression.

testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:46: in test_logical_short_circuit_returns_operand assert run('print(true && "x");') == "x\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:305: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:19: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:42: in statement return self.expr_statement() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:121: in expr_statement expr = self.expression() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:126: in expression return self.assignment() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:129: in assignment expr = self.logic_or() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:142: in logic_or expr = self.logic_and() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:149: in logic_and expr = self.equality() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:156: in equality expr = self.comparison() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:164: in comparison expr = self.term() ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:172: in term expr = self.factor() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:180: in factor expr = self.unary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:192: in unary return self.call() ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:195: in call expr = self.primary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:266: in primary raise ParseError('Expect expression.', self.peek()) E tinylang.parser.ParseError: Expect expression.

testcase.name: test_negation_returns_bool

failure.message: tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '0' at line 1, column 23

testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:52: in test_negation_returns_bool assert run("print(!true, !false, !0, !1);") == "false true true false\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:301: in parse tokens = tokenize(source_or_tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:41: in tokenize raise LexError(f"Unexpected character '{value}' at line {line}, column {col}") E tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '0' at line 1, column 23

testcase.name: test_nil_prints_as_nil

failure.message: tinylang.parser.ParseError: Expect expression.

testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:56: in test_nil_prints_as_nil assert run("print(nil);") == "nil\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:305: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:19: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:42: in statement return self.expr_statement() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:121: in expr_statement expr = self.expression() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:126: in expression return self.assignment() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:129: in assignment expr = self.logic_or() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:142: in logic_or expr = self.logic_and() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:149: in logic_and expr = self.equality() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:156: in equality expr = self.comparison() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:164: in comparison expr = self.term() ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:172: in term expr = self.factor() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:180: in factor expr = self.unary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:192: in unary return self.call() ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:195: in call expr = self.primary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:266: in primary raise ParseError('Expect expression.', self.peek()) E tinylang.parser.ParseError: Expect expression.

testcase.name: test_bool_prints_as_lowercase

failure.message: tinylang.parser.ParseError: Expect expression.

testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:60: in test_bool_prints_as_lowercase assert run("print(true, false);") == "true false\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:305: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:19: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:42: in statement return self.expr_statement() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:121: in expr_statement expr = self.expression() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:126: in expression return self.assignment() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:129: in assignment expr = self.logic_or() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:142: in logic_or expr = self.logic_and() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:149: in logic_and expr = self.equality() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:156: in equality expr = self.comparison() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:164: in comparison expr = self.term() ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:172: in term expr = self.factor() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:180: in factor expr = self.unary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:192: in unary return self.call() ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:195: in call expr = self.primary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:266: in primary raise ParseError('Expect expression.', self.peek()) E tinylang.parser.ParseError: Expect expression.

testcase.name: test_empty_input_just_eof

failure.message: assert 0 == 1 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:14: in test_empty_input_just_eof assert len(toks) == 1 E assert 0 == 1 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_let_x_eq_1_plus_2

failure.message: tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 9

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:19: in test_let_x_eq_1_plus_2 toks = tokenize("let x = 1 + 2;") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:41: in tokenize raise LexError(f"Unexpected character '{value}' at line {line}, column {col}") E tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 9

testcase.name: test_keywords_vs_identifiers

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert [] == ['KEYWORD', '...ORD', 'IDENT']
Right contains 4 more items, first extra item: 'KEYWORD' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:28: in test_keywords_vs_identifiers assert kinds(toks)[:4] == ["KEYWORD", "IDENT", "KEYWORD", "IDENT"] E AssertionError: assert [] == ['KEYWORD', '...ORD', 'IDENT'] E E Right contains 4 more items, first extra item: 'KEYWORD' E Use -v to get more diff

testcase.name: test_multi_char_punct

failure.message: AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'kind'

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:37: in test_multi_char_punct assert [t.value for t in toks if t.kind == "PUNCT"] == ["==", "!=", "<=", ">=", "&&", "||"] ^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'kind'

testcase.name: test_single_char_punct_after_multi

failure.message: AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'kind'

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:46: in test_single_char_punct_after_multi assert any(t.kind == "PUNCT" and t.value == "=" for t in toks) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_lexer.py:46: in <genexpr> assert any(t.kind == "PUNCT" and t.value == "=" for t in toks) ^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'kind'

testcase.name: test_string_escapes

failure.message: IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:51: in test_string_escapes s = [t for t in toks if t.kind == "STRING"][0] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.name: test_comments_stripped

failure.message: tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 9

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:56: in test_comments_stripped toks = tokenize("let x = 1; // a comment\nlet y = 2;") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:41: in tokenize raise LexError(f"Unexpected character '{value}' at line {line}, column {col}") E tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 9

failure.message: IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.name: test_number_and_float

failure.message: tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '4' at line 1, column 1

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:82: in test_number_and_float toks = tokenize("42 3.14") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:41: in tokenize raise LexError(f"Unexpected character '{value}' at line {line}, column {col}") E tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '4' at line 1, column 1

testcase.name: test_eof_only_once

failure.message: assert 0 == 1 + where 0 = sum(<generator object test_eof_only_once.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x108972190>)

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:90: in test_eof_only_once assert sum(1 for t in toks if t.kind == "EOF") == 1 E assert 0 == 1 E + where 0 = sum(<generator object test_eof_only_once.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x108972190>)

testcase.name: test_let_stmt

failure.message: tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 9

testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:9: in test_let_stmt p = parse("let x = 1;") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:301: in parse tokens = tokenize(source_or_tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:41: in tokenize raise LexError(f"Unexpected character '{value}' at line {line}, column {col}") E tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 9

failure.message: tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 9

failure.message: tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 18

testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:39: in test_if_else p = parse("if (x) { let a = 1; } else { let b = 2; }") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:301: in parse tokens = tokenize(source_or_tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:41: in tokenize raise LexError(f"Unexpected character '{value}' at line {line}, column {col}") E tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '1' at line 1, column 18

testcase.name: test_while_with_break_continue

failure.message: tinylang.parser.ParseError: Expect expression.

testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:47: in test_while_with_break_continue p = parse("while (x) { break; continue; }") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:305: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:19: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:42: in statement return self.expr_statement() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:121: in expr_statement expr = self.expression() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:126: in expression return self.assignment() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:129: in assignment expr = self.logic_or() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:142: in logic_or expr = self.logic_and() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:149: in logic_and expr = self.equality() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:156: in equality expr = self.comparison() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:164: in comparison expr = self.term() ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:172: in term expr = self.factor() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:180: in factor expr = self.unary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:192: in unary return self.call() ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:195: in call expr = self.primary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:266: in primary raise ParseError('Expect expression.', self.peek()) E tinylang.parser.ParseError: Expect expression.

testcase.name: test_fn_decl_is_fndecl_not_letstmt

failure.message: tinylang.parser.ParseError: Expect expression.

testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:55: in test_fn_decl_is_fndecl_not_letstmt p = parse("fn add(a, b) { return a + b; }") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:305: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:19: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:42: in statement return self.expr_statement() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:121: in expr_statement expr = self.expression() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:126: in expression return self.assignment() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:129: in assignment expr = self.logic_or() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:142: in logic_or expr = self.logic_and() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:149: in logic_and expr = self.equality() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:156: in equality expr = self.comparison() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:164: in comparison expr = self.term() ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:172: in term expr = self.factor() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:180: in factor expr = self.unary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:192: in unary return self.call() ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:195: in call expr = self.primary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:266: in primary raise ParseError('Expect expression.', self.peek()) E tinylang.parser.ParseError: Expect expression.

failure.message: tinylang.parser.ParseError: Expect expression.

failure.message: tinylang.parser.ParseError: Expect expression.

testcase.name: test_else_if_chain_parses

failure.message: tinylang.parser.ParseError: Expect expression.

testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:112: in test_else_if_chain_parses p = parse("if (a) { } else if (b) { } else { }") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:305: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:19: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:42: in statement return self.expr_statement() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:121: in expr_statement expr = self.expression() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:126: in expression return self.assignment() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:129: in assignment expr = self.logic_or() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:142: in logic_or expr = self.logic_and() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:149: in logic_and expr = self.equality() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:156: in equality expr = self.comparison() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:164: in comparison expr = self.term() ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:172: in term expr = self.factor() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:180: in factor expr = self.unary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:192: in unary return self.call() ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:195: in call expr = self.primary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:266: in primary raise ParseError('Expect expression.', self.peek()) E tinylang.parser.ParseError: Expect expression.

testcase.name: test_let_and_use

failure.message: tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '5' at line 1, column 9

testcase.failure: tests/test_scope.py:6: in test_let_and_use assert run("let x = 5; print(x);") == "5\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:301: in parse tokens = tokenize(source_or_tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:41: in tokenize raise LexError(f"Unexpected character '{value}' at line {line}, column {col}") E tinylang.errors.LexError: Unexpected character '5' at line 1, column 9

testcase.name: test_shadowing_inside_block_does_not_affect_outer

failure.message: IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.failure: tests/test_scope.py:19: in test_shadowing_inside_block_does_not_affect_outer assert run(src) == "99\n1\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:305: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:18: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:291: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:294: in peek return self.tokens[self.current] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.name: test_block_local_not_visible_outside

failure.message: IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.failure: tests/test_scope.py:29: in test_block_local_not_visible_outside assert run(src) == "7\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:305: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:18: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:291: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:294: in peek return self.tokens[self.current] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.name: test_assign_to_outer_binding

failure.message: IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.failure: tests/test_scope.py:42: in test_assign_to_outer_binding assert run(src) == "11\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:305: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:18: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:291: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:294: in peek return self.tokens[self.current] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.name: test_nested_blocks_chain_lookup

failure.message: IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.failure: tests/test_scope.py:71: in test_nested_blocks_chain_lookup assert run(src) == "1 2 3\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:33: in run ast = parse(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:305: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:18: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:291: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:294: in peek return self.tokens[self.current] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E IndexError: list index out of range
